hero.title: Unique Creations
hero.description: Every product tells a story. Discover handmade jewelry, accessories and decoratives made with passion.

footer.description: Unique handmade creations made with love and care. Every piece tells its own story.

catalog.subtitle: Discover our collection of handmade products
catalog.empty: No products found in this category

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Our story
about.storyText1: We started as a small workshop in Athens, with a vision to create unique handmade objects that combine tradition with contemporary aesthetics.
about.storyText2: Every piece we create is unique, handcrafted with natural materials and love. We believe that handmade objects carry a warmth that cannot be reproduced.
about.value1Text: Every creation is made entirely by hand, with attention to every detail.
about.value2Text: We exclusively use natural and sustainable materials in our creations.
about.value3Text: Every piece is unique. No two products in our collection are the same.
about.ctaText: Explore our collection or contact us for a custom order.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Want to learn more or make a special order? Send us a message.
contact.fillAll: Please fill in all required fields
contact.successText: We will get back to you soon.

error.title: Page not found
